methods.name: p2
methods.body: R2 * R2 * v2 * v2 * (g2 + y * y * g1 / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g1, b1)) + (b1 * b1 + g1 * g1) * y * sinKsi / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g1, b1)))

methods.name: dp2dv2
methods.body: 2 * R2 * R2 * v2 * (g2 + y * y * g1 / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g1, b1)) + (b1 * b1 + g1 * g1) * y * sinKsi / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g1, b1)))

methods.name: q2
methods.body: -R2 * R2 * v2 * v2 * (b2 + y * y * b1 / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g1, b1)) - (b1 * b1 + g1 * g1) * y * cosKsi / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g1, b1)))

methods.name: dq2dv2
methods.body: -2 * v2 * R2 * R2 * (b2 + y * y * b1 / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g1, b1)) - (b1 * b1 + g1 * g1) * y * cosKsi / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g1, b1)))

methods.name: p1
methods.body: r1 * r1 * v1 * v1 * (g1 + y * y * g2 / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g2, b2)) + (b2 * b2 + g2 * g2) * y * sinKsi / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g2, b2)))

methods.name: dp1dv1
methods.body: 2 * r1 * r1 * v1 * (g1 + y * y * g2 / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g2, b2)) + (b2 * b2 + g2 * g2) * y * sinKsi / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g2, b2)))

methods.name: q1
methods.body: -r1 * r1 * v1 * v1 * (b1 + y * y * b2 / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g2, b2)) - (b2 * b2 + g2 * g2) * y * cosKsi / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g2, b2)))

methods.name: dq1dv1
methods.body: -2 * v1 * r1 * r1 * (b1 + y * y * b2 / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g2, b2)) - (b2 * b2 + g2 * g2) * y * cosKsi / (shunt(y, cosKsi, sinKsi, g2, b2)))

helpers.name: shunt
helpers.body: (g1 + y * sinKsi) * (g1 + y * sinKsi) + (-b1 + y * cosKsi) * (-b1 + y * cosKsi)
